Tons of expert advice on the blog...

Worming Treatment Issues

Why does my dog keep getting worms even after deworming?

It goes without saying that worms are yucky and frustrating. But if you've done your bit — picked up the deworming tablets, maybe even tried to disguise them in a bit of cheese — why are the worms still bothering your pet??

Worms are persistent and getting rid of them isn’t always as simple as one pill and job done. Keep reading to find out how to remove worms from your dog for good!

4 MIN READ
Flea Identification

How to prepare for flea season this spring

It's Spring which means it's nearly that time of the year again... Peak flea season. Most pet owners don't realise that fleas are out and about all year-round, but as it starts to warm up, fleas come out in full force. Keep reading to find out how to avoid fleas this Spring!

2 MIN READ
Flea Identification

Fleas in a house with no pets? Simple steps to kill fleas in your home

If you’ve ever found yourself itching and wondered “Hang on… Do I have fleas? How's this happened?!" - You’re not alone. It’s one of those situations that feels both confusing and slightly insulting. No cat, no dog, no rabbit… Yet these tiny jumpy menaces seem to have set up camp in your carpet. Take a deep breath. Resist the urge to set fire to the sofa. Let’s unpack what’s really going on. Keep reading to find out how instantly remove fleas from your home.
